leadText: Long Reach (Japanese: えんかく Distant) is an Ability introduced in Generation VII. It is the signature Ability of Rowlet and its Evolutions, except Hisuian Decidueye.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Affected moves 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If the Pokémon uses a contact move, it will not activate any effects caused by contact. Affected moves [ edit | edit source ] The table below lists the moves affected by Long Reach, as well as the Pokémon that can have Long Reach and learn those moves. Move Type Cat. Pow. Acc. Learned by Acrobatics Flying Physical 55 100 Aerial Ace Flying Physical 60 — Astonish Ghost Physical 30 100 Brave Bird Flying Physical 120 100 Covet Normal Physical 60 100 * * * Dual Wingbeat Flying Physical 40 90 Facade Normal Physical 70 100 False Swipe Normal Physical 40 100 Frustration Normal Physical — 100 Fury Attack Normal Physical 15 85 * * * Giga Impact Normal Physical 150 90 Grass Knot Grass Special — 100 Grassy Glide Grass Physical 55 100 Knock Off Dark Physical 65 100 Leaf Blade Grass Physical 90 100 Low Kick Fighting Physical — 100 Low Sweep Fighting Physical 65 100 Peck Flying Physical 35 100 Phantom Force Ghost Physical 90 100 Pluck Flying Physical 60 100 Return Normal Physical — 100 Shadow Claw Ghost Physical 70 100 Shadow Sneak Ghost Physical 40 100 Skitter Smack Bug Physical 70 90 Solar Blade Grass Physical 125 100 Steel Wing Steel Physical 70 90 Sucker Punch Dark Physical 70 100 Tackle Normal Physical 40 100 Take Down Normal Physical 90 85 Trailblaze Grass Physical 50 100 U-turn Bug Physical 70 100 Although other contact moves are also affected by the Ability, they cannot be learned by any Pokémon with Long Reach. They may, however, be called via Metronome , Mirror Move , Copycat , or Mimic , or be used by a Pokémon that gained Long Reach by an Ability like Trace or Receiver or a move such as Skill Swap or Role Play . Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Long Reach has no effect outside of battle.
